DP.539.0000:
All I need to be happy is my TV.
That’s all I need.\f
I learn so much just sitting here.
I absorb knowledge!\f
I learned about the Pokétch app
Marking Map, for instance.\f
They say the Marking Map can track
Pokémon that travel around.\f
...I’ve never met any traveling
Pokémon, but I’ve heard about them.
DP.539.0001:
There’s big trouble!
They’re saying the volcano’ll erupt!\f
I might even have to leave here!
